arts.ttl: Football news: Man Utd plot £200m rebuild as Mikel Arteta fears "significant" injury
arts.sum: Manchester United are ready to give Ruben Amorim a £200million war chest to rebuild his squad this summer, while Mikel Arteta is concerned that Jorginho has suffered a "significant" injury

arts.ttl: Jason Tindall shows true colours with Andre Onana claim ahead of Newcastle United v Man Utd clash
arts.sum: But Tindall refused to join in the pile on for Onana and when asked he agreed with Matic's comments, the Newcastle coach said: "No, I wouldn’t say that. Newcastle United assistant manager Jason Tindall showed his class when asked about Manchester United's under fire goalkeeper André Onana ahead of the big clash at St James' Park today.

arts.sum: Manchester United make the trip to Newcastle United in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon. arts.sum: Manchester United are keen on signing Morgan Rogers from Aston Villa at the end of the season. According to Fichajes, the Red Devils are willing to pay a premium in order to get the deal done. arts.ttl: Lewis Miley calls are unfair despite Newcastle having loan decision to make
arts.sum: Former Magpies hero and BBC Newcastle pundit John Anderson caused a stir this week with his comments on Miley, after the youngster's cameo from the bench in the 3-0 win over Leicester City. It led to some fans calling in radio stations claiming United's substitutes - Miley included - weren't good enough.
